notes.hr: Elegantan uvod u Cohibu — kremast, travnat, medene slatkoće. Kraći format za 40-ak minuta.
notes.en: Elegant entry to Cohiba — creamy, grassy, honeyed sweetness. Shorter format for ~40 minutes.

notes.hr: Vrh redovne Cohiba linije — kompleksan, kremast, srednje-puno tijelo. Special occasion.
notes.en: Top of the regular Cohiba line — complex, creamy, medium-full body. Special occasion.

notes.hr: Snažniji od Sigla — klasični kubanski robusto s dubinom.
notes.en: Stronger than Siglo — classic Cuban robusto with depth.

notes.hr: Najprodavanija habanos cigara na svijetu — kakao, kava, srednje tijelo. Pouzdan izbor.
notes.en: The world's best-selling habano — cocoa, coffee, medium body. A reliable pick.

notes.hr: Legendarna piramida — bogatija i jača od No.4, sat i pol užitka.
notes.en: The legendary pirámide — richer and stronger than No.4, ninety minutes of pleasure.

notes.hr: Moderniji, širi format — mekši i kremastiji od klasične linije.
notes.en: Modern wider format — softer and creamier than the classic line.

notes.hr: Kubanski klasik punog tijela — zemljano, papreno, intenzivno. Traži ozbiljno piće.
notes.en: Full-bodied Cuban classic — earthy, peppery, intense. Demands a serious drink.

notes.hr: Puno Partagás iskustvo u pola sata — odličan uz jutarnju kavu.
notes.en: The full Partagás experience in half an hour — excellent with morning coffee.

notes.hr: Blaži kubanski klasik — cedar, cvjetne note, uravnotežen. Dobar za početnike u habanosima.
notes.en: Milder Cuban classic — cedar, floral notes, balanced. Good habanos starting point.

notes.hr: Robusto verzija slavne Churchill linije — aromatičan, srednje tijelo.
notes.en: Robusto version of the famous Churchill line — aromatic, medium body.

notes.hr: Najelegantniji kubanski robusto — blag, kremast, aromatičan. Idealan uz laganija pića.
notes.en: The most elegant Cuban robusto — mild, creamy, aromatic. Ideal with lighter drinks.

notes.hr: Kratka verzija Epicure profila — blaga i kremasta, za pola sata.
notes.en: Short version of the Epicure profile — mild and creamy, for half an hour.

notes.hr: Savršena 'kava cigara' — 25 minuta, blaga i uglađena. Najbolji mali habanos.
notes.en: The perfect 'coffee cigar' — 25 minutes, mild and refined. Best small habano.

notes.hr: Uglađena srednja linija — kava s mlijekom, cedar, blaga slatkoća.
notes.en: Polished medium line — café au lait, cedar, gentle sweetness.

notes.hr: Mala luksuzna cigara — rafinirana, medena, s finim začinima.
notes.en: Small luxury cigar — refined, honeyed, finely spiced.

notes.hr: Deblji format Trinidada — bogatiji, i dalje uglađen.
notes.en: Thicker Trinidad format — richer, still refined.

notes.hr: Najlaganiji moderni habanos — svijetao, svjež, elegantan. Za agricole i lagana pića.
notes.en: The lightest modern habano — bright, fresh, elegant. For agricole and light drinks.

notes.hr: Insajderski favorit — tamno voće, kakao, puno tijelo. Sjajan uz demerara/sherry profile.
notes.en: Insider favourite — dark fruit, cocoa, full body. Great with demerara/sherry profiles.

notes.hr: Mala marka, velika cigara — zemljano-medena, srednje-puno tijelo.
notes.en: Small marque, big cigar — earthy-honeyed, medium-full body.

notes.hr: Najblaži habanos — lagan, cvjetni, diskretan. Uz kavu ili lagani agricole.
notes.en: The mildest habano — light, floral, discreet. With coffee or a light agricole.

notes.hr: Value kubanka (short filler) — rustikalna, zemljana, svakodnevna.
notes.en: Value Cuban (short filler) — rustic, earthy, an everyday smoke.

notes.hr: Najjeftiniji pravi kubanac — grublji, ali pošten dnevni dim.
notes.en: Cheapest real Cuban — rougher, but an honest daily smoke.

notes.hr: Jedina potpuno perfecto marka — kuriozitet s medeno-drvenim profilom.
notes.en: The only all-perfecto marque — a curiosity with a honey-woody profile.

notes.hr: Klasični blagi Davidoff — besprijekorna izrada, kremast i čist.
notes.en: Classic mild Davidoff — flawless construction, creamy and clean.

notes.hr: Sofisticirana blaga linija — orašasti plemeniti profil.
notes.en: Sophisticated mild line — noble nutty profile.

notes.hr: Luksuzni blagi robusto — klasičan pairing s konjakom i starijim rumom.
notes.en: Luxury mild robusto — classic pairing with cognac and aged rum.

notes.hr: Davidoff preciznost + nikaragvanski temperament — kakao, papar, slatko-gorka kava.
notes.en: Davidoff precision + Nicaraguan temperament — cocoa, pepper, bittersweet coffee.

wrapper: Habano Ecuador (Late Hour: scotch-cask fermentiran duhan)

notes.hr: Late Hour koristi duhan odležan u scotch bačvama — rođen za pairing s whiskyjem.
notes.en: Late Hour uses scotch-cask-aged tobacco — born for whisky pairing.

notes.hr: Pristupačniji Davidoff brend — moderan nikaragvanski profil po razumnoj cijeni.
notes.en: Davidoff's accessible brand — modern Nicaraguan profile at a fair price.

notes.hr: Dominikanski klasik s Cameroon wrapperom — slatkasti začini, cedar, elegancija.
notes.en: Dominican classic with Cameroon wrapper — sweet spice, cedar, elegance.

notes.hr: Kultni mali perfecto — koncentrirana slatkoća Cameroon wrappera u 35 minuta.
notes.en: Cult small perfecto — concentrated Cameroon sweetness in 35 minutes.

notes.hr: Value legenda — blaga-srednja, kava i lješnjak, uvijek konzistentna.
notes.en: Value legend — mild-medium, coffee and hazelnut, always consistent.

notes.hr: Čisti nikaragvanski puro — zemljano-začinski, srednje tijelo.
notes.en: Pure Nicaraguan puro — earthy-spicy, medium body.

notes.hr: Nagrađivana puna linija — Melanio je bio Cigar of the Year. Bogato, slatko-začinsko.
notes.en: Awarded full line — Melanio was Cigar of the Year. Rich, sweet-spicy.

notes.hr: Nikaragvanska snaga stare škole — papar i zemlja, ne za početnike. Traži overproof rum.
notes.en: Old-school Nicaraguan power — pepper and earth, not for beginners. Demands overproof rum.

notes.hr: Moderniji, pitkiji JdN — začinsko-kremast, pristupačan.
notes.en: Modern, approachable JdN — spicy-creamy, easy-going.

notes.hr: Honduraška snaga — papreno, intenzivno, bold brend Davidoff grupe.
notes.en: Honduran punch — peppery, intense, Davidoff group's bold brand.

notes.hr: Blaža strana Camacha — kremasto s laganim paprom u pozadini.
notes.en: Camacho's milder side — creamy with light background pepper.

notes.hr: Premium nikaragvanski puro obitelji Plasencia — bogat, taman, kompleksan.
notes.en: Premium Nicaraguan puro from the Plasencia family — rich, dark, complex.

notes.hr: Srednja Plasencia linija — organski duhan, svjetliji zemljani profil.
notes.en: Plasencia's medium line — organic tobacco, brighter earthy profile.

notes.hr: Uglađena blaga linija majstora Ernesta Pereza-Carrilla.
notes.en: Polished mild line from master blender Ernesto Perez-Carrillo.

notes.hr: Pledge = Cigar of the Year 2020 — tamna slatkoća broadleafa, punije tijelo.
notes.en: Pledge = Cigar of the Year 2020 — dark broadleaf sweetness, fuller body.

notes.hr: Kratko i debelo — 'sweet spot' cigare od prve minute. Kremasta verzija.
notes.en: Short and fat — the cigar's sweet spot from minute one. Creamy version.

notes.hr: Maduro verzija — čokolada i espresso, prirodna slatkoća.
notes.en: Maduro version — chocolate and espresso, natural sweetness.

notes.hr: Honduraška boutique zvijezda — slatko-začinski, moderan profil.
notes.en: Honduran boutique star — sweet-spicy, modern profile.

notes.hr: Honduraška elegancija (Maya Selva) — mekana, medena, francuski stil.
notes.en: Honduran elegance (Maya Selva) — soft, honeyed, French style.

notes.hr: Honduraški value — pošten, blag-srednji dnevni dim.
notes.en: Honduran value — honest mild-medium daily smoke.

notes.hr: Nikaragvanski brend Maye Selve — tamniji, zemljaniji od Flor de Selve.
notes.en: Maya Selva's Nicaraguan brand — darker, earthier than Flor de Selva.

notes.hr: Blagi dominikanac — mekan, kremast, bez drame.
notes.en: Mild Dominican — soft, creamy, drama-free.

notes.hr: Meksički puro sa San Andrés duhanom — tamno, zemljano-čokoladno.
notes.en: Mexican puro with San Andrés tobacco — dark, earthy-chocolatey.

notes.hr: Nagrađivani value blend — oscuro wrapper, tamno i bogato za male novce.
notes.en: Awarded value blend — oscuro wrapper, dark and rich for little money.

notes.hr: Punokrvni nikaragvanski puro — snaga i dubina, za jaka pića.
notes.en: Full-blooded Nicaraguan puro — power and depth, for strong drinks.

notes.hr: All-maduro puro obitelji Eiroa (Camacho osnivači) — desertno taman, moćan.
notes.en: All-maduro puro from the Eiroa family (Camacho founders) — dessert-dark, mighty.

notes.hr: Svjetlija Eiroa — karamelno-začinska, honduraška klasika.
notes.en: Brighter Eiroa — caramel-spice, Honduran classic.

notes.hr: Tradicionalna dominikanska fabrika (Tabacalera Palma) — uravnotežen, aromatičan.
notes.en: Traditional Dominican factory (Tabacalera Palma) — balanced, aromatic.

notes.hr: Blendovi legendarnog Davidoff majstora — dominikanska dubina.
notes.en: Blends from the legendary Davidoff master blender — Dominican depth.

vitolas.name: Before and After Mi Familia Robusto

notes.hr: Blaža verzija boutique brenda (Artesano del Tobacco).
notes.en: Milder version of the boutique brand (Artesano del Tobacco).

notes.hr: Punija nikaragvanska boutique cigara — papreno-slatka.
notes.en: Fuller Nicaraguan boutique smoke — peppery-sweet.

notes.hr: Boutique linija u više formata (uklj. culebra kuriozitet) — tamna i bogata.
notes.en: Boutique line in many formats (incl. culebra curiosity) — dark and rich.

notes.hr: Legendarni value — nikaragvanski kakao i kava, uvijek savršena izrada.
notes.en: Legendary value — Nicaraguan cocoa and coffee, flawless construction every time.

notes.hr: Mjerilo za maduro kategoriju — kakao, espresso, savršena ravnoteža.
notes.en: The benchmark maduro — cocoa, espresso, perfect balance.

notes.hr: Vrh Padróna — puna snaga i dubina, cigara za najjača pića.
notes.en: Padrón's summit — full power and depth, a cigar for the strongest drinks.

notes.hr: Cigar of the Year 2015 — tamna, moćna, slatko-paprena.
notes.en: Cigar of the Year 2015 — dark, mighty, sweet-peppery.

notes.hr: Cigar of the Year 2012 — uglađena srednja snaga, slatki začini.
notes.en: Cigar of the Year 2012 — polished medium strength, sweet spice.

notes.hr: Kultni tamni broadleaf — gust, uljast dim; traži espresso ili tamni rum.
notes.en: Cult dark broadleaf — dense oily smoke; calls for espresso or dark rum.

notes.hr: Pristupačnija Liga alternativa — čokoladni San Andrés.
notes.en: The accessible Liga alternative — chocolatey San Andrés.

notes.hr: Kremasta shade verzija — blaga ali s karakterom.
notes.en: Creamy shade version — mild but with character.

notes.hr: Kubanski stil iz Nikaragve — boutique klasik Petea Johnsona.
notes.en: Cuban style from Nicaragua — Pete Johnson's boutique classic.

notes.hr: Američki Connecticut standard (radi Fuente) — maslac i orasi.
notes.en: The American Connecticut standard (made by Fuente) — butter and nuts.

notes.hr: Puna snaga Ashtona — zemljano-začinska bomba.
notes.en: Ashton at full power — an earthy-spicy bomb.

notes.hr: Prvi dominikanski puro — kultni, začinski, teško nabavljiv.
notes.en: The first Dominican puro — cult status, spicy, hard to find.

notes.hr: Wrapper odležan u bourbon bačvama — rođen za bourbon pairing.
notes.en: Wrapper aged in bourbon barrels — born for bourbon pairing.

notes.hr: Kremasto-medeni value Connecticut.
notes.en: Creamy-honeyed value Connecticut.

notes.hr: Najbolji RP blend — bogat, tamno-začinski.
notes.en: Rocky Patel's best blend — rich, dark-spiced.

notes.hr: Odležani wrapper (12+ god) — mekano, zaobljeno iskustvo.
notes.en: Aged wrapper (12+ yrs) — a soft, rounded experience.

notes.hr: Brazilski maduro wrapper — tamno i slatkasto, odličan value.
notes.en: Brazilian maduro wrapper — dark and sweetish, great value.

notes.hr: Cigar of the Year 2011 — honduraška dubina, box-pressed.
notes.en: Cigar of the Year 2011 — Honduran depth, box-pressed.

notes.hr: Inspirirana čokoladnim sufleom — desertna maduro cigara.
notes.en: Inspired by chocolate soufflé — a dessert maduro.

notes.hr: Tamna snaga Nicholasa Meloa — za overproof rum i Islay.
notes.en: Nicholas Melillo's dark power — for overproof rum and Islay.

notes.hr: Najbolji budget Connecticut u USA — blag, sladak, pošten.
notes.en: Best budget Connecticut in the USA — mild, sweet, honest.

notes.hr: Slavni Aganorsa duhan — slatko-začinski, kremast dim.
notes.en: Famed Aganorsa tobacco — sweet-spiced, creamy smoke.

notes.hr: Elegancija po uzoru na šampanjac — rafinirana, aromatična.
notes.en: Champagne-inspired elegance — refined, aromatic.

notes.hr: Kubanski stil stare škole — svijetao, kremast, boutique.
notes.en: Old-school Cuban style — bright, creamy, boutique.

notes.hr: Steve Saka remek-djelo — 'razgovor poslije večere' u cigari.
notes.en: Steve Saka's masterpiece — after-dinner conversation in a cigar.

notes.hr: Broadleaf punog tijela — tamna slatkoća i zemlja.
notes.en: Full-bodied broadleaf — dark sweetness and earth.

notes.hr: Cigar of the Year 2016 — golemi figurado pune snage.
notes.en: Cigar of the Year 2016 — a huge full-power figurado.

notes.hr: Najblaža poznata cigara — uz prvu jutarnju kavu.
notes.en: The mildest famous cigar — with the first morning coffee.

notes.hr: Ne-kubanska RyJ za američko tržište — blaga i pouzdana.
notes.en: The non-Cuban RyJ for the US market — mild and dependable.

notes.hr: Dominikanska Montecristo verzija — glatka, blaga, premium izrada.
notes.en: The Dominican Montecristo — smooth, mild, premium construction.

notes.hr: Najrasprostranjenija blaga cigara u EU — dostupna i u HR trafikama.
notes.en: The most widespread mild cigar in the EU — available in Croatian tobacco shops.

notes.hr: Nizozemski premium (Royal Agio) — odležani blend, EU specijalitet.
notes.en: Dutch premium (Royal Agio) — aged blend, an EU speciality.

notes.hr: Honduraška tradicija (Villiger) — blago-srednja, dostupna u EU.
notes.en: Honduran tradition (Villiger) — mild-medium, EU-available.

notes.hr: Švicarski brend, dominikanska izrada — value za EU tržište.
notes.en: Swiss brand, Dominican make — value for the EU market.

notes.hr: Odležana verzija Antaña — zaobljenija snaga.
notes.en: The aged Antaño — power with rounder edges.

notes.hr: Jubilarna edicija Serie V — svečana verzija nagrađivanog blenda.
notes.en: Anniversary edition of Serie V — the celebratory take on the awarded blend.

notes.hr: Blaga Oliva — kremasti Connecticut na nikaragvanskoj bazi.
notes.en: Mild Oliva — creamy Connecticut on a Nicaraguan base.

notes.hr: Blaga dominikanska linija — value Connecticut u puno formata.
notes.en: Mild Dominican line — value Connecticut in many formats.

notes.hr: Najstarija dominikanska fabrika (1903) — uravnotežena moderna linija.
notes.en: The oldest Dominican factory (1903) — a balanced modern line.

notes.hr: Jubilarna Aganorsa linija u tri wrappera — svilenkast dim.
notes.en: Aganorsa's anniversary line in three wrappers — silky smoke.

notes.hr: 'Crème brûlée' cigara — slatka blaga strana Steve Sake.
notes.en: The 'crème brûlée' cigar — Steve Saka's sweet mild side.
